# Vendored: ag-Grid Community 14.2.0

- **Source:** https://unpkg.com/ag-grid@14.2.0/dist/ (files: ag-grid.js, styles/ag-grid.css, styles/theme-fresh.css)
- **Version:** 14.2.0 (exact, pinned)
- **License:** MIT (ag-grid-community)
- **Why vendored:** Hermetic, offline-deterministic Playwright tests for the `adapters/ag-grid-14-adapter.css` shim — no CDN dependency at test time. Do not edit these files; they are third-party and excluded from stylelint via `**/vendor/**`.
